title: Align SpecWeave framework with Claude Opus 4.7 best practices
summary: Recalibrate SpecWeave's ~47 skills, agent templates, and workflow mechanics to leverage Opus 4.7's adaptive thinking, xhigh effort, 1M context, and reduced-subagent defaults. Retire pre-4.7 mitigations, consolidate redundant skills, deprecate stubs covered by command families, and add prompt caching.

research.methodology: 3-agent parallel research team: blog-analyst (deep analysis of Anthropic best-practices post), skill-auditor (gap analysis across 27 priority SKILL.md files), stale-detector (redundancy & dead-code audit across 47 skills + 14 agent templates)
